title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at CDAC

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at CDAC
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at CDAC. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Kolkata-based team.

About CDAC:
CDAC is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CDAC!
